title: mentha × schalkiana
intro: Mentha × schalkiana, also known as Schalk's mint or Balkan mint, is a hybrid plant of the mint family that is native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating digestive issues and relieving symptoms of colds and flu. The health benefits of Mentha × schalkiana include reducing nausea and headaches, as well as soothing sore throats and coughs. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or combining them with other herbs and ingredients.
